name: GalleryLightbox
usage_hint: Fullscreen lightbox overlay triggered via lx:lightbox:open DOM event. Scroll-snap image viewer with thumbnail sidebar. Mount once per page — all galleries share one instance.
when_to_use: For gallery grids, lookbook sections, UGC collections, or any section where clicking an image should show fullscreen. Pairs with any grid layout via CustomEvent dispatch — no direct prop wiring needed.
when_not_to_use: For inline hover-zoom (use ImageZoom). For product variant galleries with swatch selection (use ProductGallery). For single hero images. For video content (use VideoPlayer).
anti_patterns: Mounting multiple GalleryLightbox instances on one page (one is enough — it's event-driven)
Dispatching lx:lightbox:open with an empty images array (renders empty overlay)
Using low-resolution thumbnails as main images (lightbox reveals pixelation)
Not providing alt text in the images array (accessibility failure)

examples.label: Trigger from inline script
examples.html: <script>document.querySelectorAll('.gallery-img').forEach((el, i) => { el.addEventListener('click', () => { const imgs = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.gallery-img img')).map(img => ({src: img.src, alt: img.alt})); document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('lx:lightbox:open', {detail: {images: imgs, startIndex: i}})); }); });</script>

lx:lightbox:open.description: Opens the lightbox with the given images, scrolled to startIndex

lx:lightbox:close.description: Fired when the lightbox is closed (ESC, X button, or backdrop click)
